subject: A bald figure shown in close-up portrait, head tilted upward, with multiple gleaming eyes embedded across their face and scalp in addition to their natural eyes — a mortal blessed or marked with supernatural sight
description: A close-up portrait of a bald, dark-skinned figure tilting their head upward into a soft warm light. Their face and scalp are studded with extra eyes — small, bright, gold-rimmed orbs scattered across forehead, cheeks, and crown — while their own eyes gaze upward in an expression of awe or rapture. The lighting is soft and ambient with warm golden highlights against a hazy beige-and-cream background, suggesting a mythic, heavenly atmosphere rather than a defined location. The mood is reverent, transcendent, slightly unsettling.
foreground: Bald human figure with face and scalp covered in additional supernatural eyes
background: Soft hazy out-of-focus light with warm pale tones, no defined setting
emotion: rapt, awed, gazing upward as if witnessing the divine; slightly transfixed
